FAQ.metaDescription: Answers to the most common questions about MotoDigital, workshops, custom bikes and the community.
FAQ.heading: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subheading: Everything you need to know about MotoDigital.
FAQ.contactCta: Didn't find an answer? Reach out via support.

0.a: MotoDigital is Europe's first digital platform dedicated to custom motorcycle culture. We connect custom workshops, bike buyers and riders — directly, with no middlemen.

1.a: Getting started is free for both riders and workshops (FREE plan). Workshops can upgrade to Founding Partner (€39/month, only 10 seats) or PRO (€79/month) — with logo, gallery, priority listing and up to 10 custom bike uploads.

2.a: For now we're focused on the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). Expansion into other European markets is on the roadmap.

3.q: Which motorcycle styles are featured on MotoDigital?
3.a: You'll find all the major custom styles on MotoDigital: Cafe Racer, Bobber, Scrambler, Tracker, Chopper, Street and Enduro. Filter by style to find exactly what you're looking for.

4.q: How can I get in touch with MotoDigital?
4.a: You can reach us anytime through the contact form on our support page or by emailing info@motodigital.de. We typically respond within 48 hours.

0.q: How do I register my workshop?
0.a: Click "Start for free", enter your email and confirm the magic link. From there you can set up your workshop profile with location and a first bike — you'll be live in just a few minutes.

1.q: How do I find a custom workshop near me?
1.a: On the "Custom Workshops" page you'll find an interactive map with every registered workshop. You can filter by location, style and specialty.

2.q: How does getting in touch with a workshop work?
2.a: Every workshop profile has a contact button. Use it to message the workshop directly — no middlemen, no fees.

0.q: Can I create a profile as a rider?
0.a: Absolutely. As a rider you can create your own profile featuring your custom bike, discover other riders and become part of the community.

1.q: How can I sell a custom bike?
1.a: The custom bike marketplace is launching soon. You'll be able to list your bike with photos, a description and a price — buyers reach out to you directly through the platform.
